brand.name: PinFlow
brand.description: AI-Powered Pinterest Automation Suite for High-Performance Creators

pin_fonts.instructions: MUST import these fonts in index.css for Pin Generation usage:

primary.description: Vibrant Rose - Energetic, aligned with Pinterest aesthetic

secondary.description: Deep Slate - High contrast for text and structural elements

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary-foreground border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm

cards.base: bg-white border border-border/60 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-muted-foreground/25 hover:border-primary/50 hover:bg-accent/5 transition-colors rounded-xl p-12 text-center cursor-pointer

mode_selector.layout: flex space-x-2 bg-muted p-1 rounded-full w-fit mx-auto mb-12

style_rules: Background: AI Generated (Mode A) or User Uploaded (Mode B)
Text: Quote must be WHITE, Bold, Centered, with Shadow/Overlay
Footer: White strip at bottom, full width
CTA: 'Tap to learn more' in footer strip

bulk_processing.feedback: Must show progress bar and current status text

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORT PIN FONTS: Add @import for Poppins, Montserrat, Nunito in index.css immediately.
MODE IMPLEMENTATION: Create a state-driven view switcher (Mode A / Mode B). Do not use separate routes unless necessary.
EXCEL PARSING: Use 'xlsx' library. Map columns: PIN NAME, Quote, Meta Title, Meta Description, Hashtags, TAG TOPIC, CREATOR, Timing Link.
AI GENERATION: Integrate Gemini API for image generation. Use 'prompts' based on Meta Title + Description + 'pinterest aesthetic, vertical, photorealistic'.
CANVAS RENDERING: Use 'html2canvas' or server-side (Python Pillow) for high-quality pin generation. If client-side, ensure fonts are loaded first.
FALLBACKS: If AI generation fails (quota), use solid color backgrounds with patterns or placeholders.
TESTING: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
DOWNLOAD: Implement JSZip for bulk download of generated images.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute
